en: Does your company operates vehicles over 2.5 tons and up to 3.5 tons?
Please upload certified copies of the community license.
Please upload a certificate of enrollment in the register of Transport of Commissioners.
Please upload one of your company's Driver Certificate issued by DREAL or the DRIEAT.
Does your company transport a quantity of waste greater than 500kg of non-hazardous waste (article R.541-50 of the Environmental Code)?
